texto: Why there isn't any drama in my lifeSo I'll crawl on the cottonfield with a fifeWhy to have a dream in vain my life begsAm a house gecko, I eat flies and lay eggsMy death surely doesn't yield a headline and allI'll break law by pissing on a castle's wallFor my death there wouldn't be a weeping meniFrom the name of Lady Canning there's ledikeniOne foot on heaven and one foot on hell, hangingOne cannon and two cannonballs dangling.
explicacao: Citação de Nabarun Bhattacharya sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Why there isn't any drama in my lifeSo I'll crawl on the cottonfield with a fifeWhy to have a dre…” articula motivacao, anger, poetry em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e poetry.
